texto: I've done a lot of dramedies in my career. You know, I started as a standup comic, and then the movies that I was doing, like 'Up Side of Anger' were kind of like - they're hard. They're hard to sell; they're hard to get made, you know.

texto: Books are a little better movies than just screenplays because there's more fat on the bone. There's more character development. There's more stuff to pick from.
